summary: Repaired Narada architect shortcut invocation ergonomics. Added .crew/agent-shortcuts/narada-architect.cmd for command-safe PowerShell use and updated the materializer to create .crew/agent-shortcuts/narada-architect.lnk as a no-space clickable alias. Verified wrapper no-launch preflight and both shortcut readbacks.
residuals: The command-safe entrypoint is .\.crew\agent-shortcuts\narada-architect.cmd. The no-space .lnk alias is local PC substrate under an ignored directory and is intentionally not a portable package API.
